detectors.description:
HodlETH.terminal() (HodlETH.sol#269-313) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- amount = userInvested[msg.sender] * percent / 1000 * ((block.number - entryTime[msg.sender]) / 6100) (HodlETH.sol#295)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.25 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.25 (HodlETH.sol#1)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HodlETH.invest() (HodlETH.sol#227-265):
	External calls:
	- terminal() (HodlETH.sol#233)
		- msg.sender.transfer(amount) (HodlETH.sol#307)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- userInvested[msg.sender] += msg.value (HodlETH.sol#237)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [HodlETH.invest()](HodlETH.sol#L227-L265):
	External calls:
	- [terminal()](HodlETH.sol#L233)
		- [msg.sender.transfer(amount)](HodlETH.sol#L307)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [userInvested[msg.sender] += msg.value](HodlETH.sol#L237)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HodlETH.invest() (HodlETH.sol#227-265):
	External calls:
	- terminal() (HodlETH.sol#233)
		- msg.sender.transfer(amount) (HodlETH.sol#307)
	- advertisingFund.transfer(msg.value * advertisingPercent / 100) (HodlETH.sol#241)
	- techSupportFund.transfer(msg.value * techSupportPercent / 100) (HodlETH.sol#243)
	- transferRefBonus() (HodlETH.sol#253)
		- referrer.transfer(refBonus) (HodlETH.sol#341)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- transferRefBonus() (HodlETH.sol#253)
		- referrerOn[msg.sender] = 1 (HodlETH.sol#337)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [HodlETH.invest()](HodlETH.sol#L227-L265):
	External calls:
	- [terminal()](HodlETH.sol#L233)
		- [msg.sender.transfer(amount)](HodlETH.sol#L307)
	- [advertisingFund.transfer(msg.value * advertisingPercent / 100)](HodlETH.sol#L241)
	- [techSupportFund.transfer(msg.value * techSupportPercent / 100)](HodlETH.sol#L243)
	- [transferRefBonus()](HodlETH.sol#L253)
		- [referrer.transfer(refBonus)](HodlETH.sol#L341)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [transferRefBonus()](HodlETH.sol#L253)
		- [referrerOn[msg.sender] = 1](HodlETH.sol#L337)
